failed_attempts:
try dsimp only [answer]
  constructor
  · intro H
    have h_sq : ∀ t > 0, f (t ^ 2) = f t ^ 2 := by
      intro t ht
      specialize H t t t t ht ht ht ht rfl
      field_simp [h₁ (t^2) (pow_pos ht 2)] at H
      linarith
    have h1 : f 1 = 1 := by
      have := h_sq 1 zero_lt_one
      rw [one_pow] at this
      have : f 1 > 0 := h₁ 1 zero_lt_one
      nlinarith
    have h_vals : ∀ x > 0, f x = x ∨ f x = 1 / x := by
      intro x hx
      let t := Real.sqrt x
      have ht : 0 < t := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr hx
      have ht2 : t ^ 2 = x := Real.sq_sqrt (le_of_lt hx)
      specialize H t t 1 x ht ht zero_lt_one hx (by rw [one_mul, ht2])
      rw [h1, h_sq x hx, h_sq t ht, ht2, ← h_sq t ht, ht2] at H
      field_simp [h₁ x hx] at H
      have : (f x - x) * (x * f x - 1) = 0 := by nlinarith
      rcases eq_zero_or_eq_zero_of_mul_eq_zero this with h | h
      · left; linarith
      · right; field_simp at h ⊢; linarith
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    rcases h with ⟨⟨a, ha, hfa⟩, ⟨b, hb, hfb⟩⟩
    have fa : f a = 1 / a := (h_vals a ha).resolve_left hfa
    have fb : f b = b := (h_vals b hb).resolve_right hfb
    have a_ne_1 : a ≠ 1 := by intro e; rw [e, h1] at hfa; apply hfa; rfl
    have b_ne_1 : b ≠ 1 := by intro e; rw [e, h1] at hfb; apply hfb; rfl
    let y := Real.sqrt (a * b)
    have hy : 0 < y := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (mul_pos ha hb)
    have y2 : y^2 = a * b := Real.sq_sqrt (le_of_lt (mul_pos ha hb))
    specialize H a b y y ha hb hy hy (by rw [y2])
    rw [y2, fa, fb, h_sq y hy, y2] at H
    have hab_pos : 0 < a * b := mul_pos ha hb
    cases h_vals (a * b) hab_pos with
    | left hab =>
      rw [hab] at H
      field_simp [ha, hb, hab_pos] at H
      have : a^4 = 1 := by nlinarith
      have : a = 1 := by nlinarith [ha]
      contradiction
    | right hab =>
      rw [hab] at H
      field_simp [ha, hb, hab_pos] at H
      have : b^4 = 1 := by nlinarith
      have : b = 1 := by nlinarith [hb]
      contradiction
  · rintro (h | h) w x y z hw hx hy hz heq
    · simp only [h _ hw, h _ hx, h _ (pow_pos hy 2), h _ (pow_pos hz 2)]; rfl
    · simp only [h _ hw, h _ hx, h _ (pow_pos hy 2), h _ (pow_pos hz 2)]
      field_simp [hw, hx, hy, hz]
      rw [heq]
      ring
